case_title: DONOVAN GRANT VS. FIRST PREMIER SECURITY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANT, DONOVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRST PREMIER SECURITY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP FIRST PREMIER SECURITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JOINTLY AND AND SEVERALLY AS EMPLOYERS BROOKS, RANDOLPH AS INDIVIDUALS AND GENERAL PARTNERS KISHOR, SANDHAYA AS INDIVIDUALS AND GENERAL PARTNERS $4,048.76 PRINCIPAL, $4.27 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,258.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANT, DONOVAN AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST PREMIER SECURITY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP FIRST PREMIER SECURITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JOINTLY AND AND SEVERALLY AS EMPLOYERS BROOKS, RANDOLPH AS INDIVIDUALS AND GENERAL PARTNERS KISHOR, SANDHAYA AS INDIVIDUALS AND GENERAL PARTNERS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
